@@ -40,7 +40,7 @@ Goal: reduce menu open/close latency; verify via CLI-only profiling (xctrace). W

-- [ ] Cache `MenuItemHostingView.measuredHeight(width:)` by content hash + width.
+- [x] Cache `MenuItemHostingView.measuredHeight(width:)` by content hash + width.
